question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.

assessment.note: He can identify wins but explicitly says he is unsure they match the team bar, which is a strong clarity gap; the fact he can name wins suggests some engagement.

new_queue.label: Team bar mismatch
new_queue.name: You said 'team bar' — what feels unclear about it right now?

new_queue.label: Quality bar
new_queue.name: When you say a brand design is good, what tells you it's good?

new_queue.label: Feedback to action
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Expectation gap
new_queue.name: Where do my expectations for your work feel different from yours right now?

new_queue.label: Quality friction
new_queue.name: What part of the quality bar feels hardest to apply consistently?

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is getting in the way of the next skill you want to build?

new_queue.label: Reliability signal
new_queue.name: When a commitment starts to slip, what do you usually notice first?

new_queue.label: Two-week focus
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
